name: Sunil Kumar
tagline: Crafting exceptional mobile experiences with Flutter and iOS. Building the future, one app at a time.
summary: Senior Flutter Developer with 7+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance cross-platform applications. Expert in Flutter architecture, state management, and native platform integration. Delivered 19 mobile and web applications for enterprise clients including Tata Communications and Myntra. Specialized in clean code, performance optimization, Microsoft Intune MDM integration, and leading development teams.

bio: Mobile application developer with 7+ years of hands-on experience in Flutter and iOS app development. Proficient in creating cross-platform applications with Flutter, and worked on iOS projects using Swift.

Strong problem-solving skills and a dedication to staying updated with the latest advancements in mobile development. Committed to delivering high-quality, user-friendly applications that contribute to business growth.

experience.description: Building enterprise-grade Flutter applications across Android, iOS, and Web. Implementing Microsoft Intune MDM integration for secure device management and architecting scalable cross-platform solutions for talent management.

Built an e-commerce app from scratch, live on Play Store and App Store. Led code review and refactoring of live applications. Removed security vulnerabilities and upgraded Flutter dependencies across multiple projects.

Promoted 5 times in 4.5 years. Developed 10+ mobile applications from scratch across iOS and Android. Led team code reviews and mentored junior developers. Awarded 'Employee of the Month' for exceptional performance.

intune_section.title: Microsoft Intune + Flutter
intune_section.subtitle: Enterprise MDM Integration
intune_section.description: At Spire.AI, I architect and implement Microsoft Intune Mobile Device Management (MDM) integration within Flutter applications — enabling enterprise-grade security, compliance, and app protection policies across Android, iOS, and Web platforms.

capabilities.title: App Protection Policies
capabilities.description: Implement MAM policies to control data sharing, copy-paste restrictions, and screenshot prevention within managed Flutter apps.

capabilities.title: Conditional Access & SSO
capabilities.description: Integrate Azure AD-based Single Sign-On and conditional access policies, ensuring only compliant devices can access enterprise data.

capabilities.title: Managed App Configuration
capabilities.description: Deliver server-driven configurations to Flutter apps via Intune app config, allowing IT admins to remotely control app behavior.

capabilities.title: Platform Channel Bridge
capabilities.description: Build native Kotlin/Swift platform channels to bridge Intune SDK APIs with Dart, handling enrollment and compliance checks.

capabilities.title: Secure Data at Rest & Transit
capabilities.description: Enforce encryption policies for local storage and network requests, with certificate pinning and Intune-managed VPN configurations.

capabilities.title: Device Compliance Monitoring
capabilities.description: Real-time device compliance checks — jailbreak/root detection, OS version enforcement, and selective wipe capabilities.

footer.description: Senior Software Engineer specializing in Flutter and mobile app development.
